channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned trolleys with rubbish in, 1st July
item.description:
There have been several trolleys with rubbish in just left in the road and on the pavement for weeks. This area has always got things dumped. Could there be a camera up to deter and catch whoever is doing it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Playgreen Way, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tipper truck dumped with rubbish on back, 1st July
item.description:
There is a tipper truck with flat tyres and rubbish piled in the back of it. The rubbish pile on the back is getting bigger. There is also fly tipping around the van.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bin tipped over into road, 1st July
item.description:
Someone’s recycling bin has been tipped over and all the rubbish strewn in the road. The bin is hanging in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookehowse Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds growing in curbs and on pavements, 1st July
item.description:
The whole of Bellingham has weeds growing in the curbs and along the boundaries of people’s gardens - unfortunately it seems people no longer take pride in the area so are not looking after outside of their houses. The weeds are so high and look so unsightly. These are just 2 photos I’ve taken but this is similar around the estate and on Southend lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overdown Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on path near infant school, 1st July
item.description:
Massive cardboard boxes and washing machine dumped on pavement. Addressee removed labels but missed one. See photos.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86-92, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge/freezer, damaged and stripped for parts, 1st July
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge/freezer outside residential block. It has been smashed/stripped for parts and left behind. Concern about sharp metal, exposed wires, possible oil/refrigerant residue and hazardous electrical waste. It was not there earlier this evening.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hogan Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 1st July
item.description:
Please remove, blocking exit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and littering, 1st July
item.description:
The bin area is left a mess, the recycling bin is left outside of the building decorated for it. Lots of trash all over as well as fly tipping, please clean up asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken safety railings, 1st July
item.description:
Safety railings are broken - not very safe! No safety feature now in place for steep embankment. Wooden posts are raised out of the ground - sharp edges present, large pot holes in ground. Could be a danger to the public using the adjacent footpath. Heavy foot-traffic area for station use. Needs an immediate fix, please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken/Vandalised bench, 1st July
item.description:
The bench is all broken, and unusable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long brambles hanging over into the street, 1st July
item.description:
Several long, spiky brambles growing out and over the pavement. very dangerous for people, especially the visually impaired.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights out, 1st July
item.description:
All the lights are out. It is particularly unsafe for pedestrians coming home at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tulse Hill, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horrible sewage smell on the street, 1st July
item.description:
Hi, For the last week there has been a horrible sewage smell on Cleveleys Road. Due to the weather the smell has been going into peoples homes as windows are open. I believe the heat is also making the smell worse and it is disgusting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cleveleys Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing fly-tipping – 4th week in a row, 1st July
item.description:
Black bin bags have been dumped on the pavement for the fourth week in a row. This time, a green bag has also been left inside the planter outside 198 Southgate Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken speed bump, cars scraping bumpers on it all night, 1st July
item.description:
Cars scraped their bumpers on this speed bump all night long keeping us awake. The downhill side of the speed bump has been worn away by the buses and the dip catches the front of cars when they go over it. This speed bump doesn't stop cars speeding it just keeps local residents awake all night. The dip has been repaired once but it wasn't enough

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st July
item.description:
Ji I love at 87 chalcombe road Se2 9qp one of my neighbours have been kocked out by Greenwich council they live in the house of 71 chalcombe road Se2 9qp on the evening of 1st July 2026 they have been dumping all the rubbish in my big black bin and have dumped rubbish on the bit of grass I have outside my block of flats next to the big blue bin
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chalcombe Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canada docks, 1st July
item.description:
Good evening, I spotted a dead animal floating in Canada docks today. I’m not sure what it is, looks maybe like a cat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rafter Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10pm gates of the park fully open, 1st July
item.description:
Please close the gates on time! This is a recurring issue. Thanks for fixing this issue as soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carriage Drive, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible blocked drain causing flooding, 1st July
item.description:
Possible blocked drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle likely to be abandoned, 1st July
item.description:
This vehicle has been here for a couple of weeks, it has several parking tickets and a quick check confirmed it is also untaxed. I believe this is an abandoned vehicle
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkwood, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
